rationale: Spurious logging of normal interrupt during connection initialization; internal logging fix, no spec rule violated.
Removing unused package-level method; internal API cleanup with no spec involvement.

Not authenticating to arbiter nodes; implementation improvement, no specific auth spec rule cited as violated.

Adding listIndexes command support per spec; new feature implementation, not a nonconformance bug fix.

Implementing new helper API for MongoDatabase/MongoCollection; new feature work, not a bug or nonconformance.
Implementing YAML test harness for Server Monitoring/Discovery spec tests; test runner infrastructure work.
Bumping maxWireVersion for server 3.0; version compatibility update, no spec nonconformance.

Improving server selection exception to chain monitor exceptions; internal error reporting improvement, no spec rule violated.

Clarifying $snapshot cursor behavior in Javadoc; documentation fix referencing SERVER-14703, no spec nonconformance.
Completing Javadoc for driver module; documentation improvement only.
Spec requires authMechanismProperties support in connection string; driver missing CANONICALIZE_HOST_NAME and updated SERVICE_NAME property.
Deprecating mongo.getDB() in favor of getDatabase(); API deprecation, no spec nonconformance.
Deprecating unused BSONByteBuffer class; internal cleanup/deprecation, no spec involvement.
Java stores UUIDs little-endian; Python example shows cross-driver UUID byte-order divergence causing incompatibility.
Deprecating unused BSONCallback.objectStart(boolean) method; internal API cleanup, no spec involvement.
Deprecating MongoException constructor ahead of 3.0 removal; API lifecycle management, no spec nonconformance.
Pinning reads to same server as writes when reading from primary; internal session/connection behavior improvement.
Adding round-robin mongos connection support; feature implementation aligning with server-selection spec, not a bug fix.
Updating legacy API Javadoc for 2.13; documentation update only.
JMX MBean name uniqueness issue across class loaders; internal monitoring infrastructure bug, no spec rule violated.
Adding errorMessage property to exception classes; API ergonomics improvement for error handling, no spec deviation.
Moving Document class to bson module; internal package reorganization, no spec nonconformance.
Improving CodecRegistry API for customization; internal API ergonomics improvement, no spec involvement.

Invalidating all servers on auth failure; implementation improvement, no specific auth spec rule identified as violated.
Moving write result classes out of org.mongodb package; internal package reorganization, no spec nonconformance.
Deprecating DBRef.fetch and DBRefBase; API deprecation decision, no spec nonconformance.
Fixing SSL build failure on Jenkins CI; build/CI infrastructure issue, no spec involvement.
SDAM spec requires refreshing server state and clearing pool on 'not master'/'node is recovering' errors; driver was not doing this.
Removing previously deprecated DBRefBase and DBRef.fetch in 3.0; planned API removal, no spec nonconformance.

Creating default RootCodecRegistry for MongoClient; API feature addition, no spec nonconformance.

Removing deprecated getId/serverAddress from Connection interface; API cleanup, no spec nonconformance.
Refactoring Operations to use Protocol factory instead of direct construction; internal architecture refactor.
first() fetches full batch when only one document needed; performance regression, no contradicted spec rule.
Adding ServerId class combining clusterId and serverAddress; internal API addition, no spec nonconformance.
Using connectionId object instead of string in event listeners; API improvement, no specific spec rule violated.
Adding MongoClientOptions description to JMX bean name; internal monitoring improvement, no spec involvement.
